case_title: GE CAPITAL RETAIL BANK VS. KELLY LONG et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT UNABLE TO SERVE KELLY LONG FILED BY PLAINTIFF GE CAPITAL RETAIL BANK

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT AND DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF GE CAPITAL RETAIL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT LONG, KELLY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-07-2013
DECLARATION POS; OF NON SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF GE CAPITAL RETAIL BANK
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-31-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-31-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
